text: When I stand in this sleek, modern hallway peering into a glass-walled room, I feel a sense of anticipatory curiosity. The polished surfaces and meticulously arranged space suggest a controlled, perhaps experimental atmosphere. Entering the vibrant R+D exhibit, my curiosity transforms into inquisitive excitement. I am surrounded by evidence of human invention and ingenuity, and I feel the pulse of progress and potential. Here, in the glow of screens and the language of innovation, I feel a part of a larger intellectual current—invited to reflect, question, and create.
